_note: PLACEHOLDER VALUES — Robert, please correct these to match the real apartment.
description: Casa Perlamar is a light-filled two-bedroom apartment on the Costa Blanca, set just a short stroll from the golden sand of Calpe's main beach. Wake up to sea air on the private terrace, cook in a fully equipped kitchen, and cool off in the communal pool after a day in the Spanish sun.

The apartment comfortably sleeps four, with a relaxed open-plan living space, air conditioning throughout, and fast WiFi for those who like to stay connected. Whether you're here for the beaches, the Peñón de Ifach, or the tapas bars of the old town, Casa Perlamar makes an easy, comfortable base.
